```cs
using System.Security.Cryptography;
using System.Text;

public Form1()
{
    InitializeComponent();
    pictureBox1.SizeMode = PictureBoxSizeMode.Zoom;
}

private void button1_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)
{
    try
    {
        string password = textBox1.Text;
        string decrypted = Decrypt(encryptedData, null, password);
        ShowImageFromBase64(decrypted);
    }
    catch
    {
        MessageBox.Show("Wrong password!");
    }
}

private void ShowImageFromBase64(string base64String)
{
    try
    {
        byte[] imageBytes = Convert.FromBase64String(base64String);

        using (MemoryStream ms = new MemoryStream(imageBytes))
        {
            Image img = Image.FromStream(ms);
            pictureBox1.Image = img;
        }
    }
    catch (Exception ex)
    {
        MessageBox.Show("Invalid Base64 string or image format!");
    }
}

private string Decrypt(byte[] cipheredText, string textToEncrypt, string password)
{
    using (var key = new Rfc2898DeriveBytes(password, salt, 100000))
    using (Aes aes = Aes.Create())
    {
        aes.Key = key.GetBytes(32);
        aes.IV = key.GetBytes(16);
        using (var ms = new MemoryStream(cipheredText))
            if (cipheredText.Length == 0 && !string.IsNullOrEmpty(textToEncrypt)) // ENCRYPT
            {
                using (var cs = new CryptoStream(ms, aes.CreateEncryptor(), CryptoStreamMode.Write))
                using (var writer = new StreamWriter(cs))
                {
                    writer.Write(textToEncrypt);
                    writer.Close();
                    return Convert.ToBase64String(ms.ToArray());
                }
            }
            else if (cipheredText.Length != 0 && string.IsNullOrEmpty(textToEncrypt)) // DECRYPT
            {
                using (var cs = new CryptoStream(ms, aes.CreateDecryptor(), CryptoStreamMode.Read))
                using (var reader = new StreamReader(cs))
                {
                    return reader.ReadToEnd();
                }
            }
            else
            {
                throw new Exception("Incorrect input data!");
            }
    }
}

private readonly byte[] salt = Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes("Some Fixed Salt_jii_123!");
private readonly byte[] encryptedData = Convert.FromBase64String(
            "");
```
